title: erodium absinthoides subsp. armenum
intro: Erodium absinthoides subsp. armenum, also known as Armenian filaree, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the Geranium family. The plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Erodium absinthoides subsp. armenum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat respiratory problems, wounds, and skin conditions.
